'''Chromasheath''' was an iridescent [[Leather/Legends|leather]]-like material<ref name="GSWU" /> that could be used as a material to create tunics,<ref name="HSE" /> [[Armor/Legends|armor]],<ref name="FT" /> and ankle-length [[Boot/Legends|boots]].<ref name="HT">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]''
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
